score_review_needed.name: Investment Loan
score_review_needed.reason: COTD consensus: 'gets passed far too often', near-autopick for experienced players. Current score underrates it.

score_review_needed.name: Corroder Suits
score_review_needed.reason: COTD: 'a bit bonkers — tag + resource for just 2 MC more than Sponsors.' Consistently positive community opinion.

score_review_needed.name: Arcadian Communities
score_review_needed.reason: COTD: area denial is brutal in the right hands, 60 MC + 10 steel is solid. Multiple experienced players rate it higher.

score_review_needed.name: Mining Expedition
score_review_needed.reason: COTD: tempo card with oxygen track bonus potential. Effective cost ~11 MC for 1 O2 TR. Not as bad as D-tier.

score_review_needed.name: Banned Delegate
score_review_needed.reason: COTD: easily gives 1 VP for 3 MC, plus political disruption. Not great but not D42 weak.

score_review_needed.name: Energy Tapping
score_review_needed.reason: COTD: significantly better with Colonies. Almost always sees play gen 1-3 with Colonies. Current score doesn't reflect Colonies boost.

score_review_needed.name: Law Suit
score_review_needed.reason: COTD: deterrent/mind-game value is underrated, affects opponent behavior even when not played.

score_review_needed.name: Magnetic Field Dome
score_review_needed.reason: COTD: unanimous 'never a keep, sometimes playable last gen.' Current D45 may still be generous.

score_review_needed.name: Carbonate Processing
score_review_needed.reason: COTD: significantly worse with Colonies. 'D with Colonies, C without.' With all expansions format, Colonies always present.

score_review_needed.name: Preservation Program
score_review_needed.reason: COTD: 'terrible' without Pristar. Only interesting with Double Down combo. One of the weakest preludes.

score_review_needed.name: Capital
score_review_needed.reason: COTD: widely considered a trap, ~43 MC true cost with 9+ gen payoff. Even experienced defenders admit it's rare to be good.
